zh.Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯
zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel於大約1155年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯時，他的父親Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre37歲，母親Adelaide de Saint-Pol27歲。他於1190年與Matilda DE TENREMONDE結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年4月14日在法國阿托斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France: 法国帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯
zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel于大约1155年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯时，他的父亲Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre37岁，母亲Adelaide de Saint-Pol27岁。他于1190年与Matilda DE TENREMONDE结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年4月14日在法国阿托斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel was born about 1155, in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, was 37 and his mother, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, was 27. He married Matilda DE TENREMONDE in 1190. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 April 1214, in Artois, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel est né environ 1155, à Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Matilda DE TENREMONDE en 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1214, à Artois, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel um 1155 in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre 37 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Saint-Pol 27. Er hat 1190 Matilda DE TENREMONDE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. April 1214 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Artois, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel è nato il circa 1155 nel Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Matilda DE TENREMONDE nel 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1214, nel Artois, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France: フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアラス
ja.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウン
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israelが約1155年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスで生まれた時，父Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acreは37歳，母Adelaide de Saint-Polは27歳であった。1190年にMatilda DE TENREMONDEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年4月14日にフランスアルトイスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel(이)가 대략 1155년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 아라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Saint-Pol(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1190년 Matilda DE TENREMONDE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 4월 14일 프랑스 아토이스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Arras, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda DE TENREMONDE em 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1214, em Artois, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel родился около 1155 г. в местности аррас, пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Saint-Pol, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda DE TENREMONDE в 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 апреля 1214 г. в местности артоис, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel nació aproximadamente 1155, en Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Matilda DE TENREMONDE en 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1214, en Artois, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
